d: Create and manage customized weekly fixed and random notifications. Features • Schedule weekly fixed and random notifications on specific time range. • Triggered on specific days of the week. • Specify both the title and long-form multiline message. • Specify the alarm type: sound, vibration, both or muted. • Use exact alarm for non muted notifications. • Use battery preserving scheduling on muted notifications. • Group same reminder notifications together to avoid cluttering. • Localizations available for french, italian, spanish and german.
